title: Synthesis output
description: Produced by the synthesizer: dedupes and ranks findings across all areas and lenses into a prioritized set, plus quick wins, bold bets, retractions, and a coverage map.

executiveSummary.description: 2-3 paragraphs on the first-time experience overall, voiced in the primary lens.

northStar.description: The single reframing idea that would most improve first-run.

lenses.description: Which lenses flagged this (a finding seen by several lenses ranks higher).

why.description: Why it matters to a first-timer.

refineVsBold.description: One line contrasting the refine vs bold direction.

codeBug.description: Present only when this is a claimed source-code defect.

confirmed.description: Set true ONLY after re-reading the source in stage 7.

storyThemes.description: Recurring themes across the user-story corpus.

retracted.description: Findings dropped after adversarial verification or code review (reported for integrity).

why.description: Why it was retracted (e.g. automation artifact, refuted in source).

coverage.description: What the audit exercised vs missed (from the coverage critic).

missed.description: Routes/states/modalities not exercised — the next round of work.
